degraded: F0 scoped to shared/tests with -m 'not slow and not cross_plugin' (3289 passed, 12 skipped, 0 failed). The change is confined to one phase-quality verifier (shared/scripts/tools/verifiers/iterate_compliance.py) plus its dedicated meta-test (test_workflow_w2_run_id_guard.py); the shared suite is a superset of the affected surface.

behaviors.behavior: W2: a sentinel run_id (`unknown`) with the iterate dir present but no per-run marker SKIPs ('not a resolvable iterate run') instead of the previous false-FAIL via tail-fallback complexity
W2: a sentinel run_id with a status=completed external_review_state.json (run-agnostic) SKIPs rather than false-PASSing on the shared state file (the main-tree case)
W2: an empty run_id SKIPs via the guard before reaching the spec-glob, which also avoids the latent pathlib crash on the '**.md' pattern
W2: a per-run marker on disk bypasses the guard even without an exact iterate_history entry, so normal marker logic PASSes (AC-6 parity with S2)
W2 regression: a real run with an exact iterate_history entry but no marker still FAILs (the guard must not mask a genuine missing external review)

surface_verification.justification: Pure phase-quality verifier logic (check_w2_external_review_marker); no web/CLI/API app surface is reachable or affected. Behavior is fully exercised by the dedicated meta-test and the full shared/tests unit suite.
